name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana
benefits: ₹6,000 per year directly to bank account

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
benefits: Subsidy on home loan interest / Financial assistance for house construction

name: Mukhya Mantri Kanya Utthan Yojana
benefits: Financial assistance from birth to graduation (up to ₹54,100)

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
benefits: Health insurance cover of up to ₹5 Lakhs per family per year

name: Kalya Yojana
benefits: Financial aid of ₹10,000 per year for agriculture / ₹12,500 for landless

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
benefits: High interest rate savings scheme for girl child with tax benefits

name: Rythu Bandhu Scheme
benefits: ₹5,000 per acre per season to support farm investment

name: Atal Pension Yojana
benefits: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after 60 years

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 Lakh and ₹1 Crore for greenfield enterprises

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year

name: Bhavantar Bhugtan Yojana
benefits: Compensates farmers if crop prices fall below minimum support price (MSP)
